name: DCGM_FI_DEV_VGPU_LICENSE_STATUS
definition: vGPU license health status for virtual GPU deployments
absence_means: Usually metric not applicable because vGPU not enabled

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_UNCORRECTABLE_REMAPPED_ROWS
definition: Count of remapped memory rows after uncorrectable events
absence_means: No severe remap events or metric disabled

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK
definition: Current memory clock frequency
absence_means: Missing memory clock collection or unsupported device

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS
definition: Last seen Xid error code reported by driver
absence_means: No Xid events in window or collector not enabled

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_TOTAL_ENERGY_CONSUMPTION
definition: Cumulative GPU energy consumed over runtime
absence_means: Energy telemetry unavailable or reset during restart

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL
definition: Fraction of time GPU compute engines are active
absence_means: No workload running or utilization metric disabled

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_MEMORY_TEMP
definition: Current memory temperature
absence_means: Memory temperature collection unavailable on this SKU

name: DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_TX_BYTES
definition: Observed PCIe transmit throughput for the GPU
absence_means: Profiling counters not enabled or no transport activity

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_NVLINK_BANDWIDTH_TOTAL
definition: Aggregate NVLink bandwidth signal across links
absence_means: NVLink not present profiling disabled or metric not wired

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_PCIE_REPLAY_COUNTER
definition: Counter of PCIe replay events indicating link retransmissions
absence_means: No replay events or unsupported hardware telemetry path

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_COPY_UTIL
definition: Utilization of GPU memory copy engines
absence_means: No active copy workloads or metric disabled

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_CORRECTABLE_REMAPPED_ROWS
definition: Count of remapped memory rows after correctable errors
absence_means: No correctable remap events or metric unavailable

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP
definition: Current GPU core temperature
absence_means: No GPU temperature collection or unsupported device

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK
definition: Current SM clock frequency
absence_means: No SM clock collection or unsupported device

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_ENC_UTIL
definition: NVENC engine utilization
absence_means: No encode workload or encode telemetry unavailable

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED
definition: Used framebuffer memory in MiB
absence_means: No memory usage telemetry or no active allocation

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE
definition: Free framebuffer memory in MiB
absence_means: No memory headroom telemetry or no active GPU context

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_ROW_REMAP_FAILURE
definition: Boolean failure state for memory row remapping path
absence_means: No remap failure observed or metric unavailable

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE
definition: Current board power draw
absence_means: Power metric unavailable or exporter permissions missing

name: DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_RX_BYTES
definition: Observed PCIe receive throughput for the GPU
absence_means: Profiling counters not enabled or no receive transport activity

name: DCGM_FI_DEV_DEC_UTIL
definition: NVDEC engine utilization
absence_means: No decode workload or decode telemetry unavailable

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: Direct cloud billing is not emitted in DCGM metrics so cost needs external billing datasets and can only use energy as proxy
absence_means: No direct cost metric exists in this telemetry family
